caribbean.headline: Turks Caicos Faces Strong Winds
caribbean.paragraph: Turks and Caicos is experiencing winds of 19 kt with wave heights reaching 5.6 ft, while Barbados is seeing slightly stronger winds at 21 kt. I expect these conditions to persist, with a 55% chance of rain in Turks and Caicos, making for a notable weather day in the Eastern Caribbean and Lesser Antilles.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Storm Hits Marseille
mediterranean.paragraph: Marseille is experiencing strong winds of 22 kt and wave heights of 4.9 ft, with a dominant swell direction from the SSE, while Cadiz is seeing much calmer conditions with max winds of 14 kt. I expect heavy rain in Marseille, with a 100% probability of precipitation, making for a challenging day for ships in the Central Mediterranean.
